top3.sql:
WITH top_user AS (
    SELECT Id
    FROM users
    ORDER BY Reputation DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Score > 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM posts
WHERE OwnerUserId = (SELECT Id FROM top_user);

WITH most_influential_user AS (
    SELECT Id, Reputation
    FROM users
    ORDER BY Reputation DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
user_posts AS (
    SELECT p.Score
    FROM posts p
    JOIN most_influential_user u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
)
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Score > 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM user_posts;

WITH top_user AS (
    SELECT Id
    FROM users
    ORDER BY Reputation DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Score > 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM posts
WHERE OwnerUserId = (SELECT Id FROM top_user);

WITH most_influential_user AS (
    SELECT Id, Reputation
    FROM users
    ORDER BY Reputation DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
user_posts AS (
    SELECT p.Score
    FROM posts p
    JOIN most_influential_user u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
)
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Score > 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM user_posts;

WITH most_influential_user AS (
    SELECT Id AS UserId
    FROM users
    ORDER BY Reputation DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
user_posts AS (
    SELECT Score
    FROM posts
    WHERE OwnerUserId = (SELECT UserId FROM most_influential_user)
)
SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Score > 50 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage
FROM user_posts;

WITH top_user AS (
    SELECT Id
    FROM users
    ORDER BY Reputation DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Score > 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM posts
WHERE OwnerUserId = (SELECT Id FROM top_user);

WITH most_influential_user AS (
    SELECT Id, Reputation
    FROM users
    ORDER BY Reputation DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
user_posts AS (
    SELECT p.Score
    FROM posts p
    JOIN most_influential_user u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
)
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Score > 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM user_posts;

WITH most_influential_user AS (
    SELECT Id AS UserId
    FROM users
    ORDER BY Reputation DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
user_posts AS (
    SELECT Score
    FROM posts
    WHERE OwnerUserId = (SELECT UserId FROM most_influential_user)
)
SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Score > 50 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage
FROM user_posts;

final.sql:
WITH top_user AS (
    SELECT Id
    FROM users
    ORDER BY Reputation DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Score > 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM posts
WHERE OwnerUserId = (SELECT Id FROM top_user);
